name: Apple-Raisin Drop Cookies
recipeIngredient: Pkg Pillsbury Moist Supreme Yellow Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease cookie sheets.
2. In a large bowl, combine cake mix, cinnamon, nutmeg, sour cream, and eggs. Mix well.
3. Stir in apple and raisins. Drop dough by heaping teaspoonfuls about 1 inch apart onto the greased cookie sheets.
4. Bake for 10 to 14 minutes or until edges are golden brown. Remove from cookie sheets immediately. Let cool for 5 minutes or until completely cooled. Sprinkle with powdered sugar, if desired.
Makes 4 dozen cookies.
